Jeffrey,

 

As we discussed, please find attached the Rubicon Health Technologies Business Plan, in PDF format.  This document is assigned to you so in order to open this file, you will need a password that will be provided to you separately.

 

This controlled document contains information that is confidential.  The holder of this document shall not disclose or use any business and/or technical information from this document except with prior written consent and then only to the extent specified in such consent.

 

IF YOU ARE NOT PREPARED TO ACCEPT THE ENCLOSED INFORMATION ON THIS BASIS, YOU MUST RETURN THE BUSINESS PLAN TO RUBICON HEALTH TECHNOLOGIES INC. OR DELETE IT IMMEDIATELY.  YOUR ACCEPTANCE OF THE ENCLOSED CONFIDENTIAL INFORMATION WILL CONSTITUTE YOUR AGREEMENT TO BE BOUND BY THE CONFIDENTIALITY AGREEMENT CONTAINED WITHIN THIS DOCUMENT.

 

If you have any questions, please call me.

 

Dan Schiavello 
Rubicon Health Technologies Inc.
